SourceString: Chapter 1: Outskirts of the Moonlit Village
Recover the lost moonlight around Lumina and confirm the threat of the Mist Lord.
Village Field
Search the bright field just outside Lumina for traces of the extinguished lanterns.
Sapling Trail
Investigate footprints that return to the same place and echoes that repeat.
Mist Cave
Find the first shard of the dimensional rift in a cave the moonlight cannot reach.
Wraith Ruins
Read the memory stone in the collapsed ruins and witness the rift accident from thirty years ago.
Forgotten Temple
Face why the Mist Lord seized the moonlight guardian stone in the ruined temple at the forest's end.
Mist Lord
The Chapter 1 final boss, a commander of the mistbound host touched by the Abyss Realm's fog.
Memory of the Moonshadow Realm
Rebirth is not a reset; it is the process of reclaiming memories left in the Moonshadow Realm and growing stronger.
On Chapter 1 entry, class branches use one line of character tone only and never explain combat performance.
Keep the 12+ tone by using mist, whispers, and blurred afterimages to create tension.
Chapter 3: Shadow of the Dimension Lord
Trace rebirth memories and the Dimension Lord's shadow at the border of the Moonshadow Realm and the Abyss Realm.
Shadow Temple Road
Confirm shadow anomalies and reflecting lanterns on a temple approach where moonlight does not reflect.
Inverted Corridor
Find the Silver Lantern Society's final entry record in a corridor whose ceiling and floor memories are reversed.
Silent Observatory
Gain evidence that the Apostles of Moonshadow observed the rift in an observation sector where sound has vanished.
Moonshadow Stairs
Find the same stairs seen during rebirth and open a clue about the hero's past.
Dark Gate Outpost
An elite gate at the first seal before the Abyss gate, where the Dark Gatekeeper blocks progress.
Abyss Rift Belt
A rift zone where pressure from the Abyss Realm leaks directly and Dark becomes dense.
Room of Lost Names
Reveal the Silver Lantern Society's sacrifices through erased researcher nameplates and Raon's source record.
Moonless Sanctuary
Discover the Abyss Realm's opposite rule through a black guardian stone structured like Lumina's.
Dimensional Gate Heart
Hear Verkas's final proposal in the center where the dimensional gate opens and closes like a heartbeat.
Throne of the Lord's Shadow
The Chapter 3 final boss area where the hero faces the shadow of Verkas, the Dimension Lord.
Dark Gatekeeper
The Chapter 3 elite boss that guards the first Abyss gate seal and introduces the Dark gate.
Dimension Lord Verkas
The shadow of a being holding the Abyss Realm's door by will, and the Chapter 3 final boss.
Dark represents Abyss Realm pressure and the absence of moonlight, appearing heavily in late Chapter 3.
Chapter 4: Backlit Corridor of the Abyss
Follow the backlit corridor beyond Verkas's shadow and turn the direction of the Abyss sentence.
Backlit Approach
Find a passage of reversed light and Nadia's field record behind Verkas's throne.
Ash Record Room
Confirm the Silver Lantern Society's failed records in a room where burned research repeats as ash.
Frost Diffraction Bridge
Find the link between rebirth memory and backlight coordinates where frozen light bends like a bridge.
Lightning Tuning Tower
Gain evidence of a bargain between part of the Apostles of Moonshadow and Verkas at a tower that tunes rift frequency.
Backlight Seal Road
An elite gate where the Backlight Watcher tests the hero on the middle seal road that binds backlight.
Moonlight Reverse-Flow Layer
Realize that rebirth memory can become fuel for the Abyss mechanism in a layer where moonlight flows upward.
Silent Vow Chamber
Confirm that some in the Silver Lantern Society fixed the rift in place with vows in a chamber of soundless sentences.
Starless Gate
Create a moment where the hero must trust what they saw directly over records at a gate without stars or moonlight.
Sentence Depth
Hear Asterion's final vow in the boss approach where Abyss sentences are carved in layers.
Asterion's Backlit Throne
The Chapter 4 final area where the hero defeats Abyss Sentence Asterion and opens the next door toward Verkas's true body.
Backlight Watcher
The Chapter 4 elite boss that tests the direction of light and dark on the Backlight Seal Road.
Abyss Sentence Asterion
The Chapter 4 final boss that guards the Abyss sentence leading toward Verkas's true body.
Backlight is the Abyss mechanism property that reverses the direction of light to fix a rift in place.
Chapter 5: The Dimension Lord's Abyss Throne
Descend beyond the door whose backlight was bent and face Dimension Lord Verkas's true body and the Abyss Throne.
Lightless Descent
Step down for the first time beneath the door Asterion overturned, along a descent no light can reach.
Quenched Lantern Graves
Confirm traces of the first rift the Silver Lantern Society never managed to close, among graves of quenched lanterns.
Memory Sediment Basin
See how Verkas uses memory as fuel in a basin where rebirth memory has settled and hardened.
Hall of Stigma Echoes
Recover the last stigma left by the Apostles of Moonshadow in a hall haunted by the echoes of a fallen sanctuary.
Abyss Reverberation Road
An elite gate facing the Void Herald on the middle seal road where the lord's voice reverberates.
Frost Crystal Depths
Learn the danger of memory freezing as the lord's true body draws near, in a zone filled with frozen crystal depths.
Void Suture
Receive Nadia's records one last time in a zone where a torn dimension is sutured shut with darkness.
Thunderpeal Barrier
Cross the boundary of record and reality together with Raon at the last thunderpeal barrier that holds back the lord's will.
Throne Antechamber
Receive Iris's final warning and choice as an Apostle of Moonshadow in the antechamber just before the Abyss Throne.
Verkas's Abyss Throne
The Chapter 5 final area where the hero defeats Dimension Lord Verkas's true body and brings down the Abyss Throne.
Void Herald
The Chapter 5 elite boss that blocks the way, relaying the lord's voice on the Abyss Reverberation Road.
Dimension Lord Verkas, True Body
The Chapter 5 final boss who holds the dimension from the Abyss Throne by real will, not a shadow.
The Voidheart is the core of the Abyss Throne that absorbs both light and memory and turns them back into the lord's will.
